title: selaginella boninensis
intro: Selaginella boninensis, also known as Bonin spikemoss, is a type of spore-producing plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in the Pacific Islands, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella boninensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
